entry.title: LongStraw: Long-Context RL Beyond 2M Tokens under a Fixed GPU Budget
entry.summary: A growing gap separates inference context lengths from RL post-training: inference systems are approaching million-token contexts, while post-training workloads often remain at 256K tokens or below an... \u00b7 Upvotes: 183 \u00b7 GitHub Stars: 18 \u00b7 Authors: Changhai Zhou, Kieran Liu, Yuhua Zhou

entry.title: VideoChat3: Fully Open Video MLLM for Efficient and Generalist Video Understanding
entry.summary: Recent advances in video understanding have spanned motion, long video, and streaming interaction, driving this field toward real-world applications. entry.title: Harness Handbook: Making Evolving Agent Harnesses Readable,Navigable, and Editable
entry.summary: The capability of a modern AI agent depends not only on its foundation model but also on its harness, which constructs prompts, manages state, invokes tools, and coordinates execution. entry.title: PalmClaw: A Native On-Device Agent Framework for Mobile Phones
